inputs.label: k
inputs.businessContext: Number of items to choose, 0 <= k <= n

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of items to choose, 0 <= k <= n
businessContext_i18n.de: Anzahl der auszuwählenden Elemente, 0 <= k <= n
businessContext_i18n.fr: Nombre d'éléments à choisir, 0 <= k <= n
businessContext_i18n.es: Número de elementos a elegir, 0 <= k <= n
businessContext_i18n.ar: عدد العناصر المراد اختيارها، 0 <= k <= n

inputs.label: Use Symmetry
inputs.businessContext: Set to 1 to use C(n,k)=C(n,n-k) when k > n/2 for efficiency

businessContext_i18n.en: Set to 1 to use C(n,k)=C(n,n-k) when k > n/2 for efficiency
businessContext_i18n.tr: Verimlilik için k > n/2 olduğunda C(n,k)=C(n,n-k) kullanmak için 1 olarak ayarlayın
businessContext_i18n.de: Auf 1 setzen, um C(n,k)=C(n,n-k) zu verwenden, wenn k > n/2, für Effizienz
businessContext_i18n.fr: Mettre à 1 pour utiliser C(n,k)=C(n,n-k) quand k > n/2 pour plus d'efficacité
businessContext_i18n.es: Establecer en 1 para usar C(n,k)=C(n,n-k) cuando k > n/2 para eficiencia
businessContext_i18n.ar: اضبط على 1 لاستخدام C(n,k)=C(n,n-k) عندما k > n/2 لتحسين الكفاءة

inputs.label: Decimal Places
inputs.businessContext: Number of decimal places to round the result. Default 0 for integer coefficient.

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of decimal places to round the result. Default 0 for integer coefficient.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Sonucun yuvarlanacağı ondalık basamak sayısı. Tam sayı katsayısı için varsayılan 0.
businessContext_i18n.de: Anzahl der Dezimalstellen zum Runden des Ergebnisses. Standard 0 für ganzzahligen Koeffizienten.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Nombre de décimales pour arrondir le résultat. Par défaut 0 pour un coefficient entier.
businessContext_i18n.es: Número de decimales para redondear el resultado. Por defecto 0 para coeficiente entero.
businessContext_i18n.ar: عدد المنازل العشرية لتقريب النتيجة. الافتراضي 0 لمعامل صحيح.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
